message:
feat(engine): add 272 deep unit tests across 5 modules for edge-case coverage

Batch 2 enrichment — modules with lowest test-to-LOC ratios:
- parser_event_ast_equivalence.rs: 32→114 tests (+82) — corpus tier ordering,
  tamper kind serde, canonical value fields, evidence hash format, specimen
  structure validation, tier summary coverage
- quickening_feedback_lattice.rs: 34→93 tests (+59) — type feedback slot
  stability, IC hit rate blocking, superblock patterns, catalog rehashing,
  lattice monotonicity Cold→Warm→Hot→Quickened
- hindsight_trace_escalator.rs: 33→120 tests (+87) — content hash sensitivity,
  cooldown boundaries, escalation level depth ordering, category/level counts
  for suppressed decisions, support bundle manifests
- stage_envelope_certificate.rs: 33→55 tests (+22) — percentile rank ordering,
  severity boundary values, bundle budget share sums, mixed verdict scenarios,
  schema constants, observation serde
- orchestration_context_contract.rs: 35→59 tests (+24) — all enum serde/display,
  budget boundary conditions, derivation depth limits, mock seam validation,
  sequential child derivation, error display formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
